title: lamium chinense var. tuberiferum
intro: Lamium chinense var. tuberiferum, also known as Chinese Spotted Lamium or Tuberous Lamium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Lamium chinense var. tuberiferum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
